since_last: 50% of 84 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.43%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 50% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.72% · BTC -1.42% · Gold -0.05% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 50% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.43%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.43%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.76%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -6.05%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +3.21%, NOW +3.13%, WDAY +2.54%, CRM +2.16%, PLTR +2.01%. Laggards: MU -6.05%, LRCX -5.75%, AMAT -5.70%, MRVL -5.44%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.88% at $159.01
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.88% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
